email_subject: OPEN DAY OF BEFORE ADMINISTRATION: Powers Lab Online Research: Acute Timepoint
email_content:
**Save this email **

This is for the earliest acute (day of) timepoint. Here is the link to the questions to answer before starting (at the beginning of the day) as well as games to play later in the day. (links for the day after are in a separate email!)

REMEMBER: open this link only on the intended day BEFORE beginning. You will first answer questions, and then you will save your responses and return when ready to play the games!

This link will stay active for years; open it when you are ready! Save this email!

You may open the survey in your web browser by clicking the link below:
[survey-link]

If the link above does not work, try copying the link below into your web browser:
[survey-url]

This link is unique to you and should not be forwarded to others.

Thank you again so much for participating in research!

-Powers Lab

IF YOU HAVE RECEIVED THIS EMAIL MULTIPLE TIMES: Do not be alarmed;  we send this every month that you do not open the survey just as a reminder (and we will stop sending after 5 emails) :)
